content:
Lining up a few more from #9596, all just rounding out existing List families:

  • prepend_if_ok — the prepend counterpart to the existing append_if_ok
  • map3 / map4 — following on from map2

All pure Roc over existing primitives, no new low-level ops. Thinking prepend_if_ok as one small PR and map3 / map4 as a pair — anything here you'd rather see as Iter, or hold off on?

Both up:

  • prepend_if_ok → #10355 (mirrors append_if_ok)
  • map3 / map4 → #10356 (mirror map2's existing loop)

Pure Roc, no new low-level ops — each with a doc-test + repl snapshot.
